basic_details.job_title: TGCAB Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Telangana State Co-operative Apex Bank Limited (TGCAB)
basic_details.short_information: Telangana State Co-operative Apex Bank Limited (TGCAB) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for banking jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) post is not above 62 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with CAIIB/DBF/Diploma in Cooperative Business Management or equivalent; Chartered/Cost Accountant; or Post Graduate in any discipline.
qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer (CEO): Graduate with CAIIB/DBF/Diploma in Cooperative Business Management or equivalent qualifications, Chartered/Cost Accountant, or Post Graduate in any discipline. Experience: At least Eight (8) years of work experience at the Middle/Senior level in the Banking Sector.

salary_details.details: For external candidates: Consolidated pay of Rs.2,60,000/- per month, subject to deduction of applicable taxes or other statutory deductions. For internal candidates: Pay protection will be given. In addition to pay and allowances drawn by the candidates in the existing cadre, CEO Allowance @15% on Basic Pay + DA drawn by the candidate in the existing cadre will be extended.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TGCAB Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tgcab.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TGCAB CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the filled-in applications for the TGCAB Chief Executive Officer (CEO) post is 26th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CEO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Graduates with CAIIB/DBF/Diploma in Cooperative Business Management or equivalent, or Chartered/Cost Accountants, or Post Graduates in any discipline to be eligible for the CEO position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the TGCAB CEO position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) post is not above 62 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the TGCAB CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs.1000/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Chief Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and submit it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the CEO post?
faq.answer: For external candidates, a consolidated pay of Rs.2,60,000/- per month is offered. Internal candidates will receive pay protection along with a CEO Allowance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the CEO role?
faq.answer: A minimum of eight (8) years of work experience at the Middle/Senior level in the Banking Sector is required for the Chief Executive Officer position.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Telangana State Co-operative Apex Bank Limited (TGCAB).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type is mentioned as Contract/Deputation, indicating it is not a permanent government job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of TGCAB, which is https://tgcab.bank.in, and also from the website of Khammam DCCB, https://khammamdccb.in.
